title: (Senior) Projektmanager (m|w|d)
required_skills: Completed business administration degree with marketing/communication focus or equivalent
3+ years experience in communications agency consulting with 360-degree approach
Project management from briefing to delivery
Strong German and English language skills
bonus_skills: Passion for lifestyle, marketing, and advertising
matched_skills: Business administration degree — Bachelor in Management Admin (SCUT) and Master in PR & Advertising (Shih Hsin) directly relevant
Marketing project management — IPC Marketing: 4 B2B product launches, GTM strategy, vendor management
Campaign management — GRG Product Manager: GTM across 6 product lines, trade fair execution
Client and stakeholder communication — C-suite reporting (HSBC), vendor/client management (IPC Marketing)
360-degree communication context — Moli Media events (4000+ attendees), KOL management, ROI analytics
English C1 — strong English language proficiency
Briefing and project coordination — end-to-end project delivery experience across multiple roles
Trade fair and event execution — GRG 100+ B2B client demos, Moli Media large-scale events
missing_skills: Agency consulting background (specifically communications/creative agency experience)
German at required strong operational level (B1 only vs. required strong German)
Fashion/lifestyle industry passion and brand familiarity
Integrated communication campaign delivery in agency context
core_responsibilities: Interface and liaison between internal team and clients
Manage various clients for internal and external projects
Independent execution of integrated communication campaigns from briefing to delivery
Proactive liaison between agency and clients
Quality assurance of all communication measures
Monitor and coordinate internal and external workflows
Create briefings, timings, and cost estimates
recommended_emphasis: IPC Marketing: 4 product launches with B2B GTM strategy and 4.6M CNY contract acquisition as campaign execution evidence
GRG Product Manager: GTM across 6 product lines, trade fair demos for 100+ B2B clients as client-facing campaign delivery
Moli Media: 4000+ attendee event management, KOL management, ROI analytics as 360-degree project execution
PR & Advertising Master's degree (Shih Hsin) as directly relevant educational credential
C-suite and executive reporting skills for professional client presentation capability
summary: Scoring 51.4, this is a moderate match. Wiethe Content's Senior Projektmanager role is the best-matching role in this batch for Boru Lai, with direct alignment in marketing/communications education (Master in PR & Advertising), B2B product launch management (IPC Marketing), and event/campaign execution at scale (Moli Media, GRG). The primary gaps are the lack of German communications agency experience and German language proficiency below the required level. Boru should emphasize the marketing/communications background, multilingual client management capability, and B2B campaign track record when applying.
